title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  AKANE vs Pau — Views: 59,309 | Yesterday: 23
BAND-MAID / Ready to Rock (Official Teaser Video MIKU KOBATO ver.)  TVアニメ「ロックは淑女の嗜みでして」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 157,551 | Yesterday: 18
BAND-MAID / Zen (Official Teaser Video)  AKANE Ver.  MAPPAアニメ「全修。」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 42,437 | Yesterday: 14
